basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Hall Manager, Hall Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar (IIT Bhubaneswar)
basic_details.post_name: Hall Manager, Hall Assistant, Hall Attendant
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar (IIT Bhubaneswar) has released the official Hall Manager, Hall Assistant, and Hall Attendant Notification 2026 at https://www.iitbbs.ac.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the IIT Bhubaneswar Hall Manager, Hall Assistant, and Hall Attendant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 40 years of age with qualifications including 12th Pass, Bachelor's Degree, or Master's Degree can apply through email until 02 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.all_categories_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Hall Manager: Maximum 40 years Hall Assistant: Maximum 35 years Hall Attendant: Maximum 28 years

qualification.details: Hall Manager: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA on a scale of 10-point scale in the qualifying degree from a recognized University / Institute with 02 years of experience in managing hostels of Educational institutions/hotels/ Guest Houses of Public Sector Undertaking / Government Organizations/ Teaching with administrative responsibility for handling UG and PG student activities in reputed technical Institutes, etc. OR Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University / Institute with 05 years' experience in managing hostels of educational institutions/hotels/ Guest Houses of Public Sector Undertaking / Government Organizations/ Teaching with administrative responsibility for handling UG and PG student activities in reputed technical Institutes, etc. Hall Assistant: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University / Institute with 03-year experience in relevant, in relevant field such as managing hostels of educational institutions/hotels/ Guest Houses of Public Sector Undertaking / Government Organizations etc. Hall Attendant: 12th Pass with 3-year experience or Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University / Institute with 01-year experience in relevant, in relevant field such as managing hostels of educational institutions/hotels/ Guest Houses of Public Sector Undertaking / Government Organizations etc.

salary_details.details: Hall Manager: Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 32,000 per month (Consolidated) Hall Assistant: Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 22,000 per month (Consolidated) Hall Attendant: Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 18,000 per month (Consolidated)

selection_process: Interview with Skill test to check computer and English proficiency and administrative skills (accounting/store/purchase) of shortlisted candidates
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Bhubaneswar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhubaneswar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Bhubaneswar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Bhubaneswar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Hall Manager: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA on a scale of 10-point scale in the qualifying degree from a recognized University / Institute with 02 years of experience in managing hostels of Educational institutions/hotels/ Guest Houses of Public Sector Undertaking / Government Organizations/ Teaching with administrative responsibility for handling UG and PG student activities in reputed technical Institutes, etc. OR Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University / Institute with 05 years' experience in managing hostels of educational institutions/hotels/ Guest Houses of Public Sector Undertaking / Government Organizations/ Teaching with administrative responsibility for handling UG and PG student activities in reputed technical Institutes, etc. Hall Assistant: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University / Institute with 03-year experience in relevant, in relevant field such as managing hostels of educational institutions/hotels/ Guest Houses of Public Sector Undertaking / Government Organizations etc. Hall Attendant: 12th Pass with 3-year experience or Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University / Institute with 01-year experience in relevant, in relevant field such as managing hostels of educational institutions/hotels/ Guest Houses of Public Sector Undertaking / Government Organizations etc.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Hall Manager: Maximum 40 years Hall Assistant: Maximum 35 years Hall Attendant: Maximum 28 years

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Hall Manager: Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 32,000 per month (Consolidated) Hall Assistant: Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 22,000 per month (Consolidated) Hall Attendant: Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 18,000 per month (Consolidated)

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Interview with Skill test to check computer and English proficiency and administrative skills (accounting/store/purchase) of shortlisted candidates

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Bhubaneswar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 is 02-07-2026 by 5 p.m.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Hall Manager posts?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the Hall Manager (Female) post. In total, there are 4 vacancies across all the advertised positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Hall Attendant?
faq.answer: For the Hall Attendant position, candidates need to have passed 12th grade with 3 years of experience or hold a Bachelor's Degree with 1 year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Hall Assistant?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Hall Assistant post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the specified address: [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an interview along with a skill test to assess computer proficiency, English language skills, and administrative capabilities.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Hall Manager?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Hall Manager position ranges from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 32,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Bhubaneswar offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any such provisions.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be sent with the application?
faq.answer: You need to send scanned copies of original educational and experience certificates in PDF format along with the filled application form.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
